pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh logic.
Verified by matching against the verifier.py logic, the export_result.sh ground truth API spot checks, and empirical grep analysis of the real Wazuh 4.9.2 ruleset.
Matches verifier.py boundaries (50 <= total_covered <= 500) and is valid since the real Wazuh 4.9.2 ruleset has exactly 167 unique techniques.
Matches verifier.py boundaries (50 <= total_covered <= 500) and safely upper-bounds the 167 unique techniques in the real Wazuh ruleset.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Wazuh 4.9.2 default detection rules and their out-of-the-box MITRE ATT&CK mappings. The required output path matches the export scripts. The required techniques (T1110, T1053, T1059) are empirically verified to exist in the real ruleset and are structurally verified via the export script's ground-truth spot-check API queries. The allowed technique counts of 50 to 500 are verified to accurately envelop the true count of 167 unique mapped techniques present in the dataset.
